creator: rihaz.jerrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 166427
[new port]: security/cdpsnarf port file

CDPSnarf is a network sniffer exclusively written to extract information from CDP packets.It provides all the information a “show cdp neighbors detail” command would return on a Cisco router and even more.

A feature list follows:

 Time intervals between CDP advertisements
 Source MAC address
 CDP Version
 TTL
 Checksum
 Device ID
 Software version
 Platform
 Addresses
 Port ID
 Capabilities
 Duplex
 Save packets in PCAP dump file format
 Read packets from PCAP dump files
 Debugging information (using the “-d” flag)
 Tested with IPv4 and IPv6
